prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6992→8940→13934→15356→14688，整体呈明显后移趋势，近3年累计后移约7700名；2025年基准约14688名，较2024年略有回升但仍处于高位；本省物理类计划2021–2024年均为12人，2025年缩减至11人；2026年计划增至13人，较2025年扩招约18.2%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第79名，近年排名在73–82之间波动，整体稳定；2023年声誉偏负面（小语种专业录取位次明显下降）；2026年声誉仍偏负面，涉及学术不端与师德师风事件；抖音热度为较热（总排名第39），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度一般；外国语言文学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校外语类招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类近年位次大幅后移趋势、2026年计划扩招约18.2%以及本省考生总数小幅增加，扩招对位次的推后效应（位次数字增大）与考生增加带来的竞争加剧相互对冲；但扩招幅度明显大于考生增幅，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年基准14688名有所后移；预测最低位次约16311名，区间15811–16811名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6992 → 8940 → 13934 → 15356 → 14688, showing a clear backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7700 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 14688, slightly recovered compared to 2024 but still at a high level; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 12 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 13 students, an expansion of about 18.2% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and has a certain mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with fluctuations between 73 and 82 in recent years, overall stable; reputation was somewhat negative in 2023 (significant decline in admission rankings for minor language majors); reputation remains somewhat negative in 2026, involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 39th overall), with medium to high short video exposure, moderate application attention; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly correlated with the university's foreign language enrollment majors, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors has been cooling in recent years; in the 2024 major popularity analysis, foreign language majors were rated as 'generally wait-and-see'; the total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (about 391,238), slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in Physics Category rankings in recent years, the approximately 18.2% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, the backward effect of expansion (increase in ranking number) and the intensified competition from the increase in candidates offset each other; however, the expansion rate is significantly larger than the candidate growth rate, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline of 14688; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16311, with a range of 15811–16811.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15811–16811, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 foreign language and law majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 advanced translation and English joint program majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 computer and intelligent accounting and other newly established majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship foreign language majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1132 → 1553 → 1920 → 2259 → 2070, showing a clear backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 500 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2070, slightly higher than 2024 but still at a historical high; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 17 in 2025, increasing year by year; the 2026 plan increases to 18, an expansion of about 5.9% compared to 2025, which is relatively small.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 73 and 82, overall stable; in 2023, reputation was somewhat negative (admission rankings for minor language majors dropped significantly); in 2026, reputation remains somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 39), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is average; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly related to the university's History Category admission majors, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors has been cooling in recent years; in the 2024 major popularity analysis, foreign language majors were assessed as 'generally wait-and-see'; the province's total number of Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 393,700, slightly higher than 2025 (about 391,238), and the number of History Category candidates, estimated by recent proportion, is about 142,000, basically flat compared to 2025 (141,436).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of History Category rankings in recent years, the small expansion of about 5.9% in the 2026 plan, and the basically stable number of provincial History Category candidates, the backward effect of expansion (increase in ranking number) and the stable candidate scale overlap; however, the expansion is limited, and it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 2070; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2113, with a range of 1733–2493.
